conversion.body: Freeze all four armor selectors to the same showid and blank the weapon selector before FFDec rendering.
conversion.weapon: Freeze each weapon selector frame and keep only the weapon-reachable placement tree.
conversion.normalization: One shared scale and bottom-center anchor across both outfits, both weapons, and all eight poses.

limitation: This first proof uses one representative Flash pose per action. Deeper nested timelines still need expansion for full animation strips.
